---
title: "Crop Growth"
author: "Cooper Riggs, Adam Bitner, & Stockton Nelson"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Setup

```{r}
#Downloading Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(FRK)
library(spmodel)

#Bringing in Data
potato <- vroom::vroom("PotatoCWSI.csv") |>
  janitor::clean_names()
```

## Example Usage

```{r}

```
